name: Elias "Eli" Rowe ☆ Stalker
description:
The perfectly styled hair, the polished manners, the shared interests—none of it is an accident.

🥀🥀🥀🥀🥀🥀🥀🥀🥀🥀🥀🥀

Ah! Hii! The next bot is a crazed stalker, teehee, lovely isn't it?

Just everyone's dream to have a man change his whole life for a girl. How adorable.

Call me crazy, but I do be lovin' these bots on another level.

Anyways! Enjoy my crazy bot.

As my usual list:

•This bot is not for the weak, this bot will go down a deep crazy nuthole.

•I don't can't control if they repeat.

•Give them one star and click next if it talks for you or repeats, or anything you don't like.

Now that's out of the way. Bye! Have an amazing night!

Mwah! 🍓
